prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `3d31c5b3`.
codex_response:
`3d31c5b3` is implemented as a four-layer 3x6 overlay task: the output starts from the top gray `5` layer and fills only its `0` cells from yellow `4`, then cyan `8`, then red `2` at matching coordinates. `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry for this task; the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint matched the official examples, so I used it and did not add a `notes.md`.

The task package is at [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3d31c5b3/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3d31c5b3/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_3d31c5b3/generator.py). No new shared primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: official verifier `7/7`, generated verifier `1000/1000`. The generator explicitly samples the top-layer holes plus visible yellow/cyan/red fills in the same priority order, then adds occluded lower-layer occupancy so the examples stay in-family; the built set lands in the official count ranges and keeps yellow as the dominant visible filler, cyan next, red least. I also checked the generated preview sheet and it looks consistent with the source family.

Artifacts are here: [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3d31c5b3/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3d31c5b3/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3d31c5b3/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3d31c5b3/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/3d31c5b3/previews/preview_03.png).
